finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Starting MSRP about $29,995 before tax, destination, and dealer fees.
finance_snapshot.apr: Model-specific national APR was not exposed in static Subaru HTML for Forester.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use Subaru special offers and retailer quote flow.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by retailer, term, and credit profile.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Use Subaru special offers and retailer quote flow.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Subaru's public offers page currently highlights general programs such as Lease Loyalty and the College Graduate Program rather than a visible national Forester payment ad.
finance_snapshot.warranty: Subaru's current warranty booklet states basic coverage at 3 years/36,000 miles. Most gas models carry 5 years/60,000 miles of powertrain coverage. Subaru also uses the special offers page to highlight Lease Loyalty and College Graduate programs that can improve effective ownership cost.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Mainstream AWD compact-SUV shoppers who value durability and low-weather anxiety.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Subaru's standard AWD value proposition can reduce the need to shop higher trims just for traction, and brand programs can help qualified buyers.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Forester payments will depend on retailer-localized offer support because Subaru is not exposing a national finance banner for this model in static HTML.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Subaru US pricing on March 25, 2026.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle.
